archetype: Swiss & High-Contrast combined with Jewel & Luxury

typography.font_install_instructions: Add Google Fonts links for Outfit and Manrope in index.html.

buttons.primary: bg-accent text-accent-foreground hover:bg-accent-600 rounded-sm transition-colors duration-200 font-medium px-6 py-3
buttons.secondary: bg-primary text-white hover:bg-primary-800 rounded-sm transition-colors duration-200 font-medium px-6 py-3
buttons.outline: border border-border bg-transparent hover:bg-gray-50 rounded-sm transition-colors duration-200 font-medium px-6 py-3
buttons.dark_outline: border border-white/20 text-white hover:bg-white/10 rounded-sm transition-colors duration-200 font-medium px-6 py-3

inputs.default: border-border bg-transparent rounded-sm focus:ring-2 focus:ring-accent focus:border-accent transition-all duration-200
inputs.dark: border-white/20 bg-white/5 text-white placeholder:text-white/50 focus:ring-2 focus:ring-accent focus:border-accent

navigation.marketing_header: sticky top-0 z-50 bg-white/80 backdrop-blur-xl border-b border-border
navigation.dashboard_sidebar: bg-primary text-white border-r border-border-dark w-64 flex-shrink-0

hero_background.description: Modern glass office building skyline, used with a dark midnight blue gradient overlay for the main landing page hero section.

premium_lifestyle.description: Man sitting with suitcase in stylish hotel lobby, used for wealth management or premium cards section.

abstract_gold_texture.description: Abstract blue and gold premium texture, ideal for virtual card backgrounds or premium account banners.

modern_architecture.description: Contemporary skyscrapers reflecting the sky, suitable for 'About Us' or corporate sections.

specific_design_rules.borders: Use rounded-sm (2px) to maintain a sharp, premium, institutional look. Avoid heavily rounded corners (like rounded-2xl or full).
specific_design_rules.overlays: Hero images must have an overlay of bg-primary/80 to bg-primary/90 to ensure white and gold text contrast perfectly.
specific_design_rules.dashboard_cards: Dashboard cards should be flat with a 1px border. Do not use heavy shadows in the dashboard to maintain a clean data-focused view.
specific_design_rules.accents: Use gold (#D4AF37) sparingly for primary calls to action, active states, or premium tier indicators. Do not overuse gold as it can look cheap if overdone.
specific_design_rules.testing: All interactive elements must have data-testid attributes.

instructions_to_main_agent: Configure tailwind.config.js with the provided colors (primary, accent, background).
Install and set up Outfit and Manrope fonts.
Build Shadcn components (buttons, inputs, cards) using the 'rounded-sm' style instead of the default Vercel look.
For the marketing site, use generous paddings (py-24) and large, expressive typography.
For the dashboard, use a strict grid layout, smaller text sizes for data density, and clear visual hierarchy without excessive decoration.
Ensure the gold button text is dark (#0B132B) to meet contrast requirements.
Never use generic placeholder images; use the provided URLs from the media section.
